CustomField.formula: CASE( FCO__r.FCO_Type__c, "Important Field Safety Notice","Important Field Safety Notice", "Important Field Safety Modification","Important Field Safety Modification", "Important User Notice","Important User Notice", "Important Product Modification","Important Product Modification", "Product Bulletin","Product Bulletin", "Product Modification","Product Modification", "Product Recommendation","Product Recommendation", "Internal Information Exchange","Internal Information Exchange", null)
CustomField.label: FCO Type
